headlines.title: The AI boom just found two new winners: Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase
headlines.summary: Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan showed that Wall Street is a major beneficiary of the AI boom, with record revenue driven by surging trading and investment banking.

headlines.title: Here’s the inflation breakdown for June 2026 — in one chart
headlines.summary: The consumer price index rose 3.5% in June from a year earlier, a deceleration after several months of upward moves.

headlines.title: Warsh pledges Fed policy 'regime change' to rid inflation 'tax' on American people
headlines.summary: Warsh pledged Tuesday to "get monetary policy right" and defeat the inflation that has bedeviled the central bank for the past five years.

headlines.title: U.S. strikes Iran before Hormuz Strait blockade restarts
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump has said the U.S.-Iran ceasefire is over following multiple flare-ups of hostilities in the region.

headlines.title: SK Hynix options begin trading. But another group of stocks is stealing its thunder
headlines.summary: One explanation for the lack of notable call-buying is that the surge in single-stock ETFs and leveraged funds stole a big chunk of the speculative limelight.

headlines.title: Current and former employees sue Meta, alleging discrimination in using AI to conduct layoffs
headlines.summary: The lawsuit filed by current and former Meta employees underscores rising concerns about AI's impact on jobs and people with disabilities in the workforce.

headlines.title: Oil volatility is creating a 'win-win' trade strategy
headlines.summary: The United States Oil Fund (USO), the ETF that best tracks oil prices, offers equity options traders a liquid, accessible alternative to the complexities of the futures market.

headlines.title: Traders are betting on a comeback quarter for Netflix
headlines.summary: Options traders are striking a decidedly bullish tone heading into the streaming giant's earnings on Thursday.

headlines.title: Kalshi launches 'Pro' product for users trading multiple markets at same time, perpetual futures
headlines.summary: The platform is designed to alleviate problems the company's most active traders have run into, according to a memo provided to CNBC.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about these 3 stocks for the long haul
headlines.summary: Those looking for attractive stock picks amid the ongoing volatility can gain key insights by tracking the recommendations of top Wall Street analysts.

headlines.title: Berkshire Hathaway gains ground, but still trails the S&P 500 as '26 enters second half
headlines.summary: With 2026 a bit more than half over, Berkshire Hathaway's B shares are down 1.8% year-to-date and 12.4 percentage points behind the S&P 500's 10.7% gain.

headlines.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
headlines.summary: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

headlines.title: Your monthly Netflix bill is up 29% in just over a year. Critics say Washington needs to fix it.
headlines.summary: Netflix is still a Wall Street favorite — and a target for government regulators

headlines.title: Three powerful forces are draining family wealth — and your estate plan is completely unprepared
headlines.summary: From Medicaid cuts to an IRA tax trap, here are the real threats to your family’s inheritance and what to do about them.

headlines.title: What IBM’s profit warning means: Hardware is ‘eating everyone’s lunch’
headlines.summary: The company said the shortfall in its software and infrastructure business was tied to clients spending on memory ahead of price hikes.

headlines.title: Taco Bell reportedly being investigated by health officials, as cyclosporiasis outbreak spreads
headlines.summary: Shares of Taco Bell parent Yum Brands were down nearly 4% on Tuesday.

headlines.title: Wall Street has set a sky-high bar for companies to clear this earnings season. They just might pull it off.
headlines.summary: Analysts have set a sky-high bar for second-quarter earnings. However, Piper Sandler thinks corporate America can still clear it.
